userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 7 Not possible to have xccy with amortization in Markitwire
MW id 4 Not possible in VCON to have Amortizing deals
MW id 6.1 Not possible in VCON to book Float Float XXCY
MW id 7.1 Not possible in VCON to have fixing calendar different than payment calendar
MW id 7.2 Not possible in VCON to have fixing calendar different than payment calendar
Pay SEK STIBOR 3M on floating leg 144,000,000 Receive EUR EURIBOR 3M on floating leg 20,000,000 Expiry 09 mar 2017
Dodd Frank Eligible.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
